plugins.name: Backlinks Panel
plugins.description: 显示当前文档的反向链接，在任意 [[link]] 处查看哪些文档引用了它
plugins.author: MarkLite Team

plugins.name: Graph View
plugins.description: 双向链接知识图谱可视化，将笔记间的链接关系渲染为交互式节点图
plugins.author: MarkLite Team

plugins.name: Snippet Manager
plugins.description: 增强型代码片段管理，支持分类和变量占位符
plugins.author: MarkLite Team

plugins.name: Preview Editor
plugins.description: 在预览窗格中直接编辑文本，点击段落和标题即可原地修改
plugins.author: MarkLite Team
